title: Fix Deployment Error and Verify Stripe Integration

requirements.summary: Verify that the Stripe payment integration works correctly in the production environment after deployment
acceptanceCriteria: Users can initiate checkout sessions in production
Payment success and failure callbacks work as expected

file_operations.description: Review and verify the createCheckoutSession mutation to ensure proper JSON parsing of backend response, validation of session.url existence, and error handling. The mutation must validate that the parsed session includes a non-empty url before allowing redirect. Add explicit error handling if session.url is missing to prevent navigation to '/undefined'. Verify the component's usage instructions from the stripe component before implementing.

Verify that the payment page correctly uses window.location.href for Stripe URL redirection (not router navigation), validates that session.url exists before redirecting, and displays appropriate error messages if the checkout session creation fails or returns an invalid URL. Ensure no navigation to '/undefined' occurs. The page must check 'if (!session?.url) throw new Error' before any redirect attempt. Verify the component's usage instructions from the stripe component before implementing.

Review the payment success page to ensure it properly handles the Stripe redirect callback from production URLs, invalidates cart queries correctly, and displays appropriate success messaging. Verify that the route registration at '/payment-success' is functioning correctly in the production environment.

Review the payment failure page to ensure it properly handles the Stripe redirect callback from production URLs and provides clear user guidance. Verify that the route registration at '/payment-failure' is functioning correctly in the production environment.

Verify that the route definitions for '/payment-success' and '/payment-failure' are correctly registered and will function properly in the production deployment environment. Ensure no route configuration issues that could cause deployment failures.

Review the Stripe configuration component to ensure it correctly checks isStripeConfigured status and only displays the setup form when Stripe is not configured. Verify proper error handling and state management for production environment.
